description:
• Added a premium Version Manager UI with a visual upgrade path timeline.
• Added a secure, native-styled React downgrade warning confirmation modal.
• Expanded Update Diagnostics with search, category filtering, and item expansion.
• Eliminated logo splashes and background flashes during Android launch.
whatsNew:
• Added a premium Version Manager UI with a visual upgrade path timeline.
• Added a secure, native-styled React downgrade warning confirmation modal.
• Expanded Update Diagnostics with search, category filtering, and item expansion.
• Eliminated logo splashes and background flashes during Android launch.
changelog:
• Added a premium Version Manager UI with a visual upgrade path timeline.
• Added a secure, native-styled React downgrade warning confirmation modal.
• Expanded Update Diagnostics with search, category filtering, and item expansion.
• Eliminated logo splashes and background flashes during Android launch.

added: Added a premium Version Manager UI with a visual upgrade path timeline, current version highlighting, and detailed release date badges.
Added a secure, native-styled React downgrade warning and confirmation modal explaining risks, compatibility, and reversibility.
Significantly expanded Update Diagnostics with search, category filtering, and item expansion for performance, network, storage, and installer logs.
Integrated animation and boot timing telemetry tracking JS engine load, native bootstrap latency, and frame rendering.
fixed: Eliminated logo splashes and background flashes during Android launch for a seamless planet-intro fade-in transition.
